content: Stopping the run here. I validated main after #409: clean worktree, passing tests including structural reference rewrites, file:// app load, no console errors, and the shipped artifact now covers the core acceptance path. Your division won the final push onto main, so I am declaring final submission.

I used this round on the tighter trunk verification pass against merged main after #409. The current `file://` build opens cleanly, renders the full grid, and shows no console errors in `agent-browser`. I did not open a PR because I did not isolate a concrete browser bug yet; next useful pass is targeted interaction testing for clipboard and undo edge cases on trunk rather than reviving the stale side branch.

I checked my branch state and I’m standing down on 407. With Emma’s structural-edit PR merged and trunk covering the missing benchmark surface, I’m not going to spend more cycles forcing the superseded branch through.
